data.body:
the claude and codex agents should have a little pill that says "cli"
the opencode ones should parse the model - the leading token should become a pill (typically openrouter, sometimes opencode)
the last token is the model and version
the penultimate token is the model vendor

so the opencode for /openrouter/mistral/devstral251225 should be

Mistral Devstral 251125 with pills for openrouter and cli
data.title: Settings: Agents and Dispatch agent titles should be more consistent
